case_title: SYLVESTER JOHNSON VS. SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY et al

docket_entries.description: DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, SYLVESTER
ARBITRATOR'S FEE STATEMENT, SENT TO ACCOUNTING FOR - ROBERT J. RYAN
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE AUG-08-2002.

THIS CASE SET FOR CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON FEB-14-2003 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212. FOR JUDGMENT, DISMISSAL OR TRIAL DE NOVO. IF FILED, APPEARANCES WAIVED DEC-17-2002 ARBITRATION OSC IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, SYLVESTER AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          APR-26-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-22-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAR-29-2002
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
STATEMENT OF DECISION FILED BY ARBITRATOR, ROBERT J. RYAN
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, SYLVESTER SERVED DEC-27-2001, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-17-2002 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, SYLVESTER
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR JUL-29-2002. APR-26-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR DEAN ANTHONY ALPER.
ARBITRATOR ROBERT JOSEPH RYAN APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION AUG-21-2002 THROUGH NOV-19-2002.

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, SYLVESTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY $2,100.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,100.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR RUSSELL LEIBSON.
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF FEB-14-2003, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION FILED (SWEEP)
